name: LATAM Airlines Group S.A.
description: LATAM Airlines Group S.A. is the leading airline group in Latin America, formed through the merger of LAN Airlines and TAM Linhas Aéreas. Headquartered in Santiago, Chile, the company provides extensive passenger and cargo transportation services, connecting destinations across South America, North America, Europe, and Oceania. As a major aviation holding company, it operates a comprehensive network of domestic and international flights, playing a critical role in regional connectivity and global trade. The group is committed to operational excellence, sustainability, and enhancing the travel experience for millions of passengers annually across its diverse fleet.
